Summary
Strong communication, collaboration & team building skills with proficiency at grasping new technical concepts quickly
and utilizing them in a productive manner. Experienced in web application development and resolving project-related
issues efficiently. Able to communicate effectively with multifunctional teams, programmers, and technical staff at all

& analytical skills in resolving complex software issues.

Manoharbhai Patel Institute of Engineering and Technology

Experience
Java Developer Full-time
Xoriant Solutions Pvt Ltd Sep. 2017 - Present
•Developed various modules for Hertz, focusing on frontend screens and backend webservices to handle XML and
JSON data.
•Executed full-stack development from backend to middleware to frontend, ensuring seamless integration and func-
tionality.
•Performed bug fixing and proactive development of enhancements to improve application performance and user
experience.
•Resolved application incidents within defined SLAs and created task tickets for tracking and resolution.
•Debugged and provided solutions for workflow issues, ensuring smooth application operations.
•Addressed database issues and offered technical support to Business Analysts (BAs).
•Monitored deployments and assessed their impact on ongoing jobs, ensuring minimal disruption.
•Contributed to the automation of daily activities and process-based organization, increasing efficiency.
•Achieved on-time, within-budget delivery, consistently meeting customer quality expectations.
•Maintained a comprehensive knowledge base of domain specifics, known defects, issues, processes, and development
techniques.

Programming Languages: Java - SQL - PL/SQL - C - C++ - JSP
Web Technologies: BootStrap - Ext JS - XML - Web Services
Databases: Oracle - MS-SQL - MS-Access - MS-Excel
Tools: Toad - Eclipse - SoapBox - Postman
Operating Systems: Windows

Yasmin Sayed is a Java Developer with contact information including email (yasmin.sayed@email.com), phone number (+20 101 234 5678), and links to her GitHub (github.com/yasmin-sayed) and LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/yasmin-sayed) profiles, as well as a personal website (yasmin-sayed.com).

Yasmin Sayed possesses strong communication, collaboration, and team-building skills, quickly grasping new technical concepts. She is experienced in web application development and efficiently resolves project issues, communicating effectively with diverse teams. She has expertise in Java, SQL, Ext JS, JSP, XML, and Web services, alongside strong analytical skills.

Yasmin Sayed received a B.E. in Computer Technology from Manoharbhai Patel Institute of Engineering and Technology in January 2017, located in Gondia, Maharashtra, India. She also completed her Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) from S.M.P. Science College in Gondia, Maharashtra, India.

From September 2017 to the present, Yasmin Sayed has worked as a Java Developer at Xoriant Solutions Pvt Ltd. Her responsibilities included developing modules for Hertz, full-stack development, bug fixing, proactive enhancements, resolving incidents, debugging workflow issues, addressing database issues, monitoring deployments, automating daily activities, and maintaining a knowledge base.

Yasmin Sayed possesses skills in various programming languages (Java, SQL, PL/SQL, C, C++, JSP), web technologies (BootStrap, Ext JS, XML, Web Services), databases (Oracle, MS-SQL, MS-Access, MS-Excel), and tools (Toad, Eclipse, SoapBox, Postman), as well as operating systems (Windows).

Yasmin Sayed is a dedicated Java Developer, a builder of digital solutions with over six years invested at Xoriant Solutions Pvt Ltd. She’s a full-stack practitioner, comfortable navigating the entire development lifecycle – from crafting individual modules for projects like Hertz, to tackling complex bug fixes and proactively enhancing existing systems. Yasmin doesn’t simply *resolve* incidents; she dissects workflow and database issues, ensuring smooth operation. A pragmatic problem-solver, she’s also keenly focused on efficiency, automating daily tasks and meticulously documenting knowledge for the benefit of her team. Beyond her professional commitments, Yasmin maintains an active online presence, sharing her work and connecting with the wider developer community through GitHub (github.com/yasmin-sayed) and LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/yasmin-sayed), and showcasing her skills further at yasmin-sayed.com. Reachable via email at yasmin.sayed@email.com or by phone at +20 101 234 5678, she represents a blend of technical expertise and a commitment to continuous improvement.

Yasmin Sayed is a resourceful and quick-learning Java Developer, a pragmatic problem-solver fluent in the language of modern web application development. She’s a collaborative spirit, adept at bridging communication gaps within diverse teams and translating technical complexities into actionable solutions. While proficient across a broad spectrum of technologies – Java, SQL, BootStrap, Oracle, and more – XML holds a particular place in her skillset, representing a foundational element in her ability to build and maintain robust web services. 

For over six years at Xoriant Solutions, she’s been a key contributor to projects like Hertz, handling everything from full-stack development and meticulous bug fixing to proactive system enhancements and rapid incident resolution. She doesn’t simply *fix* problems; she anticipates them, automating daily tasks and diligently documenting solutions for future reference.  Her expertise extends beyond coding to encompass database management, deployment monitoring, and a keen analytical eye for workflow optimization.  Essentially, Yasmin is a builder – someone who not only understands the individual components of a system but also how they interconnect and function as a whole, with XML often serving as a crucial link in that chain.

Yasmin Sayed is a resourceful and rapidly adaptable Java Developer, currently contributing her expertise to Xoriant Solutions Pvt Ltd since 2017. She’s a problem-solver at heart, adept at full-stack development, bug fixing, and proactively enhancing existing systems – particularly those involving Hertz – while consistently meeting service level agreements. Her toolkit is extensive, encompassing Java, SQL, PL/SQL, Ext JS, JSP, XML, and web services, alongside proficiency in databases like Oracle and MS-SQL. 

Beyond technical skill, Yasmin excels in collaborative environments, possessing strong communication and team-building abilities. She’s quick to grasp new concepts and effectively translates technical details to diverse teams, often providing support to Business Analysts. Her foundation is a Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Technology from Manoharbhai Patel Institute of Engineering and Technology (India), built upon a strong secondary education at S.M.P. Science College. 

You can find her work and connect with her online through her GitHub (github.com/yasmin-sayed), LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/yasmin-sayed), and personal website (yasmin-sayed.com), or reach her directly at yasmin.sayed@email.com or +20 101 234 5678. She’s comfortable navigating environments utilizing tools like Toad, Eclipse, SoapBox, and Postman, and is proficient with Windows operating systems.
